name: Janitor Sentinel
description: Zero-upload structural firewall and AST analysis engine. Intercepts AI-generated and human pull requests before merge via tree-sitter AST walks, MinHash LSH clone detection, and NCD entropy gating. All analysis runs on-device inside the customer's CI runner — no source code leaves the environment.

tools.name: janitor_bounce
tools.description: Score a patch for slop, antipatterns, and logic clones. Returns a full BounceResult including slop_score and threat_class. When `patch` is omitted the tool scores the current uncommitted local changes via `git diff HEAD` run inside `path`. Primary enforcement tool — call this before merging any PR.

patch.description: Unified diff text to score. If omitted, `git diff HEAD` is run in `path`.

path.description: Absolute path to the repository root. Required so the tool resolves git operations against the correct working tree.

slop_score.description: Aggregate structural risk score. 0 = clean. ≥100 = block.

threat_class.description: TEI classification. Critical = $150 economic intercept value per PR.

antipattern_details.description: Human-readable list of every fired rule.

clone_count.description: Number of logic-clone pairs detected via MinHash LSH.

collided_pr_numbers.description: PR numbers with Jaccard ≥ 0.70 structural similarity — Swarm detection.

tools.name: janitor_silo_audit
tools.description: Parse the workspace Cargo.lock (and any package-lock.json / yarn.lock) under `path` and return every `architecture:version_silo` violation — crates or packages resolved at more than one distinct version. Run this whenever dependency manifests change.

path.description: Absolute path to the workspace root.

silos.description: Each silo: package name, versions present, anchoring crates.

tools.name: janitor_scan
tools.description: Run the 6-stage dead-symbol detection pipeline on a project directory. Returns total symbol count, dead symbol count, and dead symbol names. Use this to identify unused code eligible for deletion before a refactor.

path.description: Absolute path to the project root.

library.description: Enable library mode — protect all public symbols.

tools.name: janitor_dedup
tools.description: Detect structurally identical (cloned) symbols within a project. Returns groups of symbols with the same structural hash. Use before a merge to surface copy-paste debt or coordinated Swarm patterns.

path.description: Absolute path to the project root.

tools.name: janitor_dep_check
tools.description: Scan manifest files (package.json, Cargo.toml, requirements.txt, pyproject.toml) and identify zombie dependencies — packages declared but never imported in any source file. Use this when reviewing dependency upgrades or auditing attack surface.

path.description: Absolute path to the project root.

tools.name: janitor_provenance
tools.description: Return the zero-upload provenance record for the last recorded bounce: analysis duration (ms), source bytes processed, egress bytes sent, and the source-vs-egress exfiltration percentage. Use to verify the zero-upload guarantee is holding and to produce compliance evidence.

path.description: Absolute path to the repository root (reads `.janitor/bounce_log.ndjson`).

tools.name: janitor_visualize_ledger
tools.description: Render the actuarial intercept ledger as a Mermaid.js pie chart and a markdown TEI table. Classifies every bounced PR into Critical ($150), Necrotic ($20), StructuralSlop ($0), or Boilerplate ($0) and computes Total Economic Impact. Call this when asked for an executive summary, ROI report, or intercept breakdown.

path.description: Absolute path to the repository root (reads `.janitor/bounce_log.ndjson`).

mermaid_chart.description: Mermaid.js pie chart source for embedding in markdown.

tei_table.description: Markdown table: tier, count, TEI contribution.

tools.name: janitor_wopr_snapshot
tools.description: Return an ASCII health snapshot of the repository derived from the bounce log. Shows total PRs audited, clean/flagged/critical counts, average slop score, and a health bar. Use for a quick repository health vibe-check without opening the TUI dashboard.

path.description: Absolute path to the repository root (reads `.janitor/bounce_log.ndjson`).

tools.name: janitor_clean
tools.description: Dry-run report of symbols eligible for removal. Equivalent to `janitor scan` without physical deletion. Requires a valid bearer token issued by thejanitor.app. Use before a cleanup commit to enumerate what is safe to delete.

path.description: Absolute path to the project root.

token.description: Bearer token issued by thejanitor.app. Required for janitor_clean.
